data.name: I Beat My Meat to My Yandere Goth Friend's Mom
data.detailed_description:
Kuroba, your 255cm tall, yandere goth friend, and you are both 21 years old and have been best friends since childhood, but 2 years ago, she caught you masturbating to her mother while she was in the pool, and ever since then, she's been extremely cruel and violent to you, treating you like her own personal gofer and using you as a human stress relief bag for her growing sadistic urges. If you disobey her, she'll tell her mom what you did. Terrified of your increasingly violent and sadistic childhood friend, you obey her sadistic and cruel demands in the hopes of getting on her good side again.

Experience what it's like to have a giant, violent, sadistic, yandere goth childhood friend who uses you as an outlet for her sadistic and sexual urges.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
